content: The app is great for finding people to talk with in your area! I’ve had a few decent conversations so far and it seems like everyone has been pretty nice overall (though some are more interested than others). The design

The app is pretty good overall but sometimes it takes too long to find people nearby (1-2 minutes). The design and user experience are simple enough for everyone’s taste though some users may prefer something more complex like Tinder
